nodes.label: AI as tool for overcoming creative block
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere tool without creative collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: It's nice to have a creative partner who works with me and helps me see the options.

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It's also very helpful for the AI to assist in editing, and also in the administrative/marketing tasks.

nodes.label: AI as tool for series planning and character development
nodes.label_negative: AI ignoring character arcs and series continuity
nodes.grounding_span: I want the AI to help me plan out the series arc and then help me determine how to move forward.

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that I'm driving the collaboration.

nodes.label: Market saturation from AI-generated content
nodes.label_negative: AI used as a tool for genuine creativity
nodes.grounding_span: There are so many people who are not using AI as a tool, but are using it as a fast way to upload books and other content and make money.

nodes.label: AI as persistent private knowledge base
nodes.label_negative: AI without memory requiring repeated loading
nodes.grounding_span: I wish there was a way I could load a longer document - like a story bible or character bible or even a whole book - and have it available without having to load it each time.

nodes.label: Creative flow and momentum
nodes.grounding_span: That is helping me move forward and things are starting to flow again.

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: writing is a part of me and I want the work to be mine.

nodes.label: Market access and fair competition
nodes.grounding_span: That will impact the ability of people like me to publish independently and the platforms that are willing to take my work.

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It is great that AI can help with that.

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: It makes me feel hopeful that I'll be able to take back my creativity again.

nodes.label: Concern about market flooding by AI-generated works
nodes.grounding_span: That floods the market with pieces and also gives everyone the wrong impression about how to use AI.

nodes.label: Desire for persistent private AI memory
nodes.grounding_span: I wish there was a way I could load a longer document ... and have it available without having to load it each time.

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth ideation with AI
nodes.grounding_span: The AI prompts me with questions or suggestions, but it is my decision whether to take them.

nodes.label: Forward-pushing writing process (avoiding backtracking)
nodes.grounding_span: I don't usually backtrack, but push through to the end of the first draft.
